languages.text: Оказалось, что за убийством отпрыска Гапраков стоит Ювенна. Такие вести наверняка заинтересуют сенешаля Ларию.

traits.locale_text: Оказалось, что за убийством отпрыска Гапраков стоит Ювенна. Такие вести наверняка заинтересуют сенешаля Ларию.

languages.text: It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. This revelation would surely interest Seneschal Voigtvir.
languages.original_text: Оказалось, что за убийством отпрыска Гапраков стоит Ювенна. Такие вести наверняка заинтересуют сенешаля Ларию.

traits.locale_text: It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. Such tidings would surely interest Seneschal Laria.

It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. This revelation would surely interest Seneschal Laria.

languages.text: Wie es scheint, hat Juvenna die Ermordung des Gaprak-Erben inszeniert. Diese Neuigkeit wird Truchsessin Voigtvir gewiss interessieren.
languages.original_text: It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. This revelation would surely interest Seneschal Voigtvir.

traits.locale_text: Wie es scheint, hat Juvenna die Ermordung des Gaprak-Erben inszeniert. Diese Neuigkeit wird Truchsessin Voigtvir gewiss interessieren.

languages.text: Juvenna a orchestré le meurtre de l'héritier des Gaprak. Cette découverte devrait intéresser la sénéchale Voigtvir.
languages.original_text: It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. This revelation would surely interest Seneschal Voigtvir.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna a orchestré le meurtre de l'héritier des Gaprak. Cette découverte devrait intéresser la sénéchale Voigtvir.

languages.text: 现已查明，尤文娜策划了杀害贾帕克家族子嗣的事件。这一发现必然会引起维特威尔总领的兴趣。
languages.original_text: It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. This revelation would surely interest Seneschal Voigtvir.

traits.locale_text: 现已查明，尤文娜策划了杀害贾帕克家族子嗣的事件。这一发现必然会引起维特威尔总领的兴趣。

languages.text: Se ha descubierto que Juvenna organizó el asesinato del heredero Gaprak. Esta revelación debería resultar de gran interés para la senescal Voigtvir.
languages.original_text: It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. This revelation would surely interest Seneschal Voigtvir.

traits.locale_text: Se ha descubierto que Juvenna organizó el asesinato del heredero Gaprak. Esta revelación debería resultar de gran interés para la senescal Voigtvir.

languages.text: どうやらジュヴェンナがガプラカ家の子孫殺害の黒幕のようだ。このようなニュースは、ラリア元老院長の興味を引くに違いない。
languages.original_text: It appears that Juvenna is behind the murder of the Gaprakas' offspring. Such news is sure to interest Seneschal Laria.

languages.text: Gaprak vârisinin cinayetini Juvenna'nın planladığı ortaya çıktı. Bu aydınlanma kesinlikle Seneşal Voigtvir'in ilgisini çekecektir.
languages.original_text: It has been revealed that Juvenna orchestrated the murder of the Gaprak scion. This revelation would surely interest Seneschal Voigtvir.

traits.locale_text: Gaprak vârisinin cinayetini Juvenna'nın planladığı ortaya çıktı. Bu aydınlanma kesinlikle Seneşal Voigtvir'in ilgisini çekecektir.
